positive: A breathtaking, highly stylized cosmic forest scene. Central composition featuring intricate glowing bioluminescent flora interwoven with abstract geometric celestial bodies like moons and distant galaxies. The overall aesthetic is neo-art nouveau mixed with futuristic sci-fi, utilizing clean, sharp silhouettes and extreme contrast. Dominant color palette of deep indigo, cosmic violet, electric cyan, and subtle gold accents. The scene must look perfect as a seamless, high-detail print graphic, emphasizing clear outlines and strong visual flow. Cinematic, ultra-detailed, vector illustration quality, 8k resolution, perfect composition for apparel print.
